Osc And Temporary Restraining Order Prayer For Injunctive Relief Priliminary Injunction
Off Calendar May-26-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF HOLDEN GREEN'S "Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order Prayer For Injunctive Relief Preliminary Injunction."
APPEARANCE: Holden W. Green, Esq. 408/354-5674 pltf & moving party inpropria persona; no other appearances.
RULING: The Court did not allow any oral argument since plaintiff did not comply with the tentative ruling rule. Therefore, the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DENY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (302/REQ/REQ) Court Reporter Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
